description: Extract brand design tokens from a PPTX file or Website URL.

params.instruction: Based on the extracted visual data (DOM/CSS or PPTX layout), identify the primary and secondary brand colors, heading and body fonts, and general aesthetic (e.g., 'minimalist', 'vibrant', 'corporate'). Output a structured Kyberion Design Spec (JSON).

params.code: const spec = ctx.design_spec || {}; const brandSlug = String(ctx.brand_name_slug || 'extracted-theme').trim(); const brandName = String(ctx.brand_name || spec.brand_name || spec.name || brandSlug).trim(); const themeKey = brandSlug; const colors = spec.colors || spec.theme?.colors || {}; const fonts = spec.fonts || {}; const themeName = String(spec.name || `${brandName} Extracted Theme`); const normalizedTheme = { name: themeName, colors: { primary: colors.primary || colors.dk1 || colors.primary_color || '#0F172A', secondary: colors.secondary || colors.dk2 || colors.secondary_color || '#334155', accent: colors.accent || colors.hlink || colors.accent_color || '#38BDF8', background: colors.background || colors.lt1 || '#FFFFFF', text: colors.text || colors.tx1 || '#1E293B' }, fonts: { heading: fonts.heading || fonts.title || 'Aptos, sans-serif', body: fonts.body || 'Aptos, sans-serif' }, ...(spec.assets ? { assets: spec.assets } : {}) }; ctx.registered_theme_key = themeKey; ctx.registered_theme_name = themeName; ctx.theme_catalog_overlay = { version: '1.1.0', default_theme: themeKey, themes: { [themeKey]: normalizedTheme } }; ctx.presentation_preference_profile = { kind: 'presentation-preference-profile', profile_id: `${themeKey}-presentation-preferences`, scope: 'default', theme_selection_policy: { decision_mode: 'ask_when_uncertain', ask_user_when: ['audience_unclear', 'brand_alignment_unclear', 'new_deck_category'], default_theme_hint: themeKey }, brief_question_sets: [{ label: `${brandName} deck brief`, deck_purposes: ['proposal', 'internal_share', 'briefing'], questions: ['Who is the audience?', 'What should the deck help decide?', 'How long should the deck be?'] }], theme_sets: [{ label: `${brandName} extracted theme`, deck_purposes: ['proposal', 'internal_share', 'briefing'], theme_hint: themeKey, design_traits: ['brand_aligned', 'executive', 'minimal'] }] };
